original: The psychic onslaught leaves you staggered, reeling from the mental blow. You’re Stunned
Though you’re reeling, and suffering from an intense headache, you manage to pull yourself together in a hurry.

You dig your [pc.feet] in and hold on for dear life, refusing to be blown away by the beast... but even then, you quickly realize that the snow is blasting all around you. It’s almost impossible to see -- you’re all but blinded!

The gail-force of the wind sends you flying to the ground, sprawling out across the ice. Worse, you quickly realize that the snow is blasting all around you. It’s almost impossible to see -- you’re knocked down and all but blinded!

Psychic energy assaults your mind, filling your brain with confused and swirling thoughts, and your vision becomes incredibly hazy. It’s hard to focus on the fight, and your reflexes and aim both seem lowered by the psychic miasma.
You grab your head, desperately resisting the onslaught of psychic energy assaulting your mind.
You manage to duck down under the sweeping strike, avoiding what might have been a deadly blow.
You take the blow right to the chest, sending you hurdling back through the air. When you land, you’re left gasping for breath, feeling like your chest has been completely crushed by the impact.
You leap out of the way, letting the frostbolt bury into the ground. It sticks there like a spear, quivering for a moment before shattering into shards of glass.
The bolt hammers into you, wrapping you in frigid cold. Your whole body convulses and shivers, wracked by frostbite and shards of ice.
You duck one of the wyrm’s claw-swipes.
One of the wyrm’s claws slices you, hammering into your chest with monumental force.
You duck one of the wyrm’s claw-swipes.
One of the wyrm’s claws slices you, hammering into your chest with monumental force.
You duck one of the wyrm’s claw-swipes.
One of the wyrm’s claws slices you, hammering into your chest with monumental force.
